content.en:
Ancient Gold Monument, Inner Domain.

Ye Tian had been trying to create the Ancient Bone Technique, and he was about to succeed.

As for the other primordial-level geniuses who had passed the fourth assessment, they frowned one by one, obviously feeling that they had no hope of passing the fourth assessment.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian created an ancient bone technique, and it was recognized by the ancient golden tablet.

Airplanes!!!!

The light of the ancient golden tablet shrouded Ye Tian, representing that Ye Tian had passed the fourth assessment.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor has really passed the fourth assessment!!"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor exclaimed.

In the fourth assessment, he had never passed this assessment, and the other primordial-level geniuses present had never passed this assessment.

As a result, the eyes of several primeval-level geniuses all looked at the Endless Heavenly Ancestor.

There are jealous ones.

There are also enviable.

There are also blandness so, who don't care about anything and continue to create the primeval osteopathy.

Ye Tian continued to move forward, walked a distance, and ushered in his fifth assessment.

At this time, he was already very close to the Ancient Golden Monument.

Airplanes!!!

The fifth assessment has arrived.

"The fifth assessment, this is too difficult!"

Ye Tiandu frowned.

The fifth assessment of the Taikoo Golden Tablet actually required him to perfect a mutilated Taigu Bone Technique, and gave him dozens of Taikoo Jinwen.

These dozens of primeval golden inscriptions are all related to this mutilated primeval bone technique.

However, if you want to perfect this primeval bone technique, you need to understand the mysteries of these primeval golden inscriptions, otherwise how can you perfect it?

"It's too difficult!"

Ye Tian felt that he might not be able to pass this assessment.

However, this should also be the last assessment, after all, he is already very close to the Taigu Golden Monument, and after passing this assessment, there is no area to continue to move forward.

"Go all out and try to pass this test!"

Ye Tian still used the old method, that is, to use the copy of the body to cultivate the mutilated primeval bone technique, and in this way, he could understand where this primeval bone technique was missing.

Of course, he also had to understand these ancient golden texts, otherwise even if he knew the problem later, he would not be able to improve it.

Fortunately, there was plenty of time, so he wasn't hopeless.

As the years passed, Ye Tian understood one after another Ancient Golden Scripts, and his duplicate bodies were constantly trying to cultivate the mutilated Ancient Bone Technique, causing the duplicated bodies to be scrapped one by one.

After a long time, Ye Tian had understood a lot of primeval golden texts, and he also had a lot of understanding of this mutilated primeval bone technique, so he hoped to have it.

He hasn't started trying to fix it yet, though, and it doesn't make any sense to fix it now, maybe even fix the bug.

If he started repairing it now, he wouldn't be able to complete this assessment 100%.

Airplanes!!!!

When the time for the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor came, he did not complete the fourth assessment and was moved out of the Inner Domain.

......

Outside.

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor came out.

Many Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses knew that the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor had been eliminated.

"Master, you have been eliminated, could it be that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has broken into the fifth assessment?" the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

Because according to the time, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor was the first to enter the fourth assessment, and the Stygian Sword Heavenly Ancestor was the second to enter the fourth assessment.

Now that the time for the fourth assessment of the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor has run out and he has been eliminated, then if the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has not completed the fourth assessment, he will definitely be eliminated first.

This truth can be known by a little calculation.

"Yes, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has passed the fourth assessment and is currently overcoming the fifth assessment!" said the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor enviously.

Hearing the words of the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor, all the Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses were shocked.

This time, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is the real name of the entire territorial sea boundary crack, directly suppressing a group of primeval-level geniuses, and can be called the most demonic primeval-level genius in the territorial sea boundary crack!

Ye Xingchen also heard their conversation, and immediately admired his father even more.

However, he also knew very well that he would never want to follow in his father's footsteps for the rest of his life.

Soon.

Ao Heng and Moyu Heavenly Ancestor were also ostracized from the Inner Domain one by one.

As time passed, only Ye Tian was left in the entire inner domain.

The primeval-level geniuses and boundary-breaking geniuses in the outside world were all waiting, and since they couldn't pay attention to the situation in the inner domain, they didn't know Ye Tian's situation either.

Even if Ye Tian really passed the fifth level, they would only know the result when Ye Tianming carved the Taigu Golden Tablet.

......

Inner domain.

Ye Tian was alone here to overcome the fifth assessment, and he was engrossed in it, doing his best to comprehend one by one the ancient golden texts.

Finally, after a long time, he understood all the ancient gold texts in the fifth assessment.

And he also had enough knowledge of that mutilated primeval bone technique.

"It's time to make it perfect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he used these ancient golden inscriptions and his own perception and understanding to try again and again to perfect this mutilated primeval bone technique.

Some time passed, and the first refinement failed.

"Keep improving!"

After that, he began to refine it a second time, learning from his previous mistakes, but this time he still failed.

Failed again and again, but each failure allowed Ye Tian to find experience.

"Time is running out!"

Ye Tian noticed that there was not much time left for the assessment, but he still did not panic and continued to calmly perfect the Broken Ancient Bone Technique.

Just when the time was about to end, Ye Tian succeeded.

Airplanes!

A complete Ancient Bone Technique was successfully perfected by Ye Tian and recognized by the Ancient Golden Tablet.

In an instant, countless golden lights enveloped Ye Tian, but the other primeval-level geniuses couldn't see this scene.

That's when it happened.

The Outer, Middle, and Inner Domains began to shrink, and in the blink of an eye, they were taken back by the Ancient Gold Tablet.

At this time, everyone saw Ye Tian.

Whoa!!

One by one, primeval-level geniuses came over and stood in front of the primeval golden monument.

At this time, the Ancient Gold Tablet began to reveal the names of primeval-level geniuses one by one.

If it is the first time to break into the Inner Domain, it will be engraved with the Ancient Gold Tablet. If you break into the inner region and complete one more assessment, you will also be marked on the ancient gold tablet.

Soon, one by one, the primeval geniuses were inscribed on the primeval gold monuments, and the brilliant names shone in all directions, which was also a huge honor.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor, the first assessment in the inner domain

This means that the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor has passed the first assessment in the Inner Domain.

As time passed, the introductions of primeval geniuses were updated.

For example, Ao Heng, last time it was the second assessment in the inner domain, but this time it was the third assessment in the inner domain.

At this time, all the primeval-level geniuses were expecting Ye Tian to engrave the primeval golden tablet, so that they would know if Ye Tian had passed the fifth assessment.
